description: Product Description REDCAMP is an outdoor equipment brand. We design and develop high quality products as well as provide our customers more comfort and security during their adventures. By adhering to the concept of"Enjoy your trip, enjoy nature" Redcamp aims to provide superior products that satisfies all the wants and needs of our customers. We encourage a close relationship with nature. Trust Redcamp, trust yourself! This REDCAMP travel Duffel Bag is a multipurpose bag which can be used as a large sports and gym duffle bag as well as travel duffle when you are on and about. What's more, it can be even used as a dirty laundry compartment at home. Its high quality and durable material provides the same function as a large suitcase. It's fashionable and outstanding design which will make your journey more colorful and graceful. A go-with-feel travel Pack your world and dream, enjoy the lightweight journey. Experience the magical things never meet, and to seek the unknown world beyond life with hope and yearning. Dimension Weight: 0.7lbs/0.3kg Weight Capacity: 96L Unfolded Size: 31"x12"x16"/80x30x40cm Package Size: 8”x7”x0.5” /20x18x2cm MULTIFUNCTIONAL This Foldable duffel bag can hold a multitude of items, including clothing, bedding such a sleeping bags and ground pads, workout gear, baby playpens, groceries, and much more. It’s also perfect for equipment that is used in sports and recreational activities like hockey, baseball, boating, fishing, paintball, and skiing. The smaller exterior pockets can accommodate toiletries, shoes, electronics, travel documents, toys, etc. Details Water-resistant fabric Water resistant travel duffle bag is made out of high quality 300D Oxford PU450 fabric, resisting wear and tear. 2 way open end Convenient zippers to open or close the bag, The REDCAMP large duffel bag is equipped with 2-way zippers.
